exploration_notes: Created CompositFieldValidator in django/forms/validators.py as a new module. The class accepts fields (list of 2+ field names), a validate function, a message, and optional error code. It integrates into Django's form validation pipeline via: (1) DeclarativeFieldsMetaclass in forms.py was extended to collect CompositFieldValidator instances from class attributes (similar to how Field instances are collected), walking the MRO to support inheritance; (2) BaseForm._clean_composite_validators() was
